user.title: Select ODL stations
user.description: Select one or more stations. The list is loaded live from the German Federal Office for Radiation Protection (BfS). Data license: Data licence Germany – attribution – version 2.0 (dl-de/by-2-0).

error.cannot_connect: The BfS data interface could not be reached or processed.

abort.already_configured: ODL Measurements for Home Assistant is already configured.

init.title: Configure ODL measurements
init.description: Change selected stations and the polling interval.

error.cannot_connect: The BfS data interface could not be reached or processed.
